message:
feat(tests): comprehensive test enrichment across 119 engine modules

Massive concurrent agent sweep adding edge-case, serde roundtrip,
Display/Error trait, boundary-condition, and property-based test coverage
to existing engine modules. Total: ~19,000 lines of test additions across
119 source files + 2 existing test files.

All modifications are pure test additions within #[cfg(test)] blocks.
No production logic changes. Each module receives targeted coverage for:
- Display trait uniqueness (all variants produce distinct strings)
- Serde roundtrip (serialize → deserialize → compare)
- Error trait implementations (source(), to_string())
- Boundary conditions (zero, max, overflow, empty input)
- State machine transitions (valid and invalid paths)
- Helper function edge cases (clamping, hashing, canonicalization)

Modules span all engine domains: security, evidence, scheduling, proof
verification, capability management, policy enforcement, orchestration,
observability, compilation, parsing, and runtime lifecycle.

Also includes parser_multi_engine_harness.sh refinements: added
--parser-event-ast-equivalence and --parser-error-recovery flags,
report validation improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
